faqs.answer: Pest emergencies include active wasp or hornet nests near entryways, large rodent infestations, bed bug discoveries, multiple rat or mice sightings, aggressive stinging insects, bats inside living spaces, or any pest situation posing immediate health or safety risks. We're available 24/7 to assess and address urgent situations in Carle Place homes and businesses.
